description: Date range picker with dual side-by-side calendars, range preset buttons (Today, Last Week, Last Month, etc.), hover highlighting, and a two-click start/end selection flow.

examples.title: Date range picker with custom presets
examples.code:
<TmDateRangePicker @bind-Value="dateRange"
                   Label="Filter dates"
                   Presets="@customPresets"
                   MinDate="@(new DateOnly(2025, 1, 1))"
                   DateFormat="yyyy-MM-dd" />
